title: Senior Project Manager
description:
Hydroinformatics Institute Pte. Ltd. ("H2i") are looking to strengthen its leadership team with a Senior Project Manager. This is a pivotal role for a professional capable of not only executing complex consultancy and technology development projects in water resources and environmental management but also playing a strategic role in shaping our Consulting business.

You will act as a primary interface with our customers, fostering strong partnerships while holding them accountable to project prerequisites and timelines. You will provide leadership to cross-functional teams and contribute directly to the company’s strategic initiatives for growth and market leadership.

Key Responsibilities

·      Strategic Leadership & Business Shaping

o   Collaborate with the COO to refine delivery methodologies, improve Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), and drive operational excellence within the division.

o   Provide mentorship and leadership to cross-functional teams, fostering a culture of accountability and high performance.

o   Proactively work with management to develop new business opportunities and lead the preparation of high-quality proposals for new projects.

·      Client Management & Accountability

o   Act as the trusted advisor to clients while rigorously managing client-side dependencies. You will hold customers accountable for their deliverables (data, approvals, resources) to ensure project momentum.

o   Lead difficult conversations regarding scope creep and change control, ensuring that project objectives remain aligned with commercial agreements.

·      Project Execution & Financial Control

o   Execute and manage consultancy and technology development projects related to real-time water resource management (e.g., forecasting systems, water quality modelling) from initiation to post-completion handoff.

o   Develop detailed project plans outlining scope, milestones, and resource allocations. Proactively identify risks and implement mitigation measures.

o   Financial Management: Manage project budgets (> $1 million SGD) and cash flows, including processing payment claims, assessing financial impacts of changes, and ensuring projects are delivered within budget.

o   Reporting: Maintain accurate data in the project management system and report project status to senior management on a bi-weekly and ad-hoc basis.

Minimum Qualifications

·   Minimum 8-10 years of experience in managing consultancy and technology development projects, with a proven track record of delivering projects on time and within budget.

·      Master of Science degree in relevant field.

·      Must be legally eligible to work in Singapore. Singapore citizens and PRs preferred.

Desirable Qualifications

·      Familiarity with working with government procurement procedures and executing projects in public sector domains.

·      Experience in managing projects with budgets exceeding $1million SGD.

·      Experience or affinity with real-time control applications and operational management systems (e.g. FEWS, MIKE Operations).

·     Experience or affinity in working with water modelling software packages (e.g. WFLOW, Sobek, Mike11, Delft 3D).

·      Experience or affinity in working with management/collaboration tools such as Confluence, Slack, Zoho and Gitlab.

·      PMP certification or equivalent.

Skills and Competencies

·      Ability to navigate complex regulatory environments.

·      Excellent communication skills for stakeholder management and reporting progress updates within and outside of own domain.

·      Analytical skills for problem solving and risk mitigation.

·     Strong leadership skills to manage cross functional teams effectively.

postedCompany.description: The Hydroinformatics Institute develops and applies technology-enabled, digital solutions to some of the world’s most pressing water-related challenges. Our products and services help clients harness the power of data, advanced analytics, and modelling to unlock insights at the global, regional, and local levels – and in real time. The team’s expertise spans hydrodynamic modelling of inland and coastal water systems, weather management, and operational management systems. H2i, a Singapore-based company, is behind landmark water management projects in countries including Brunei, Oman, Singapore, Sri Lanka, Philippines, and Vietnam. In 2018, we were named Small Business Rising Star at the Winsemius Awards.
postedCompany.name: HYDROINFORMATICS INSTITUTE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
